Notice Of Motion For Order That Matters Specified In The Requests For Admissions Set Two To Joanna Cheung Aka Lampo Joanna Chueng Be Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GREEN MATRIX SECURITIES LLC ASSIGNEE'S Motion For Order That Matters Specified In The Requests For Admissions Set Two To Joanna Cheung Aka Lampo Joanna Chueng Be Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions.

The unopposed motion for a deemed admitted order is granted. Plaintiff has filed a proof of service of summons. Defendant Lampo Joanna Cheung aka Joanna Cheung has not responded to the Requests for Admission at issue. The matters in RFAs 10-17 (attached as Exhibit 1 to the Graves Declaration) are deemed admitted by this defendant. (See Code Civ. Proc., section 2033.280, subds. (b), (c).) Cheung is ordered to pay $50 to Plaintiff in sanctions within 30 days of entry of this order. (Id. [monetary sanctions are mandatory when a party does not respond to RFAs].)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
